{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154503D3B008851D564FB391B0"}"},"total":74},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7259170435027698473","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很好呦!平民们都懂感恩，之前看的别的类似的把平民和地主世家们写的非常蠢，明着跟女主作对，就奇葩，明明看着许多东西一夜而成还明着作对，太蠢了。这个还不错，最重要的是让平民们参与到建设中来，没有坐享其成就很好，如果能定期开展主题教育，给平民们启蒙，让他们知道城市是他们一起建造的，对城市有更深的归属感就更棒啦!希望能出现很多因为成长而惊才艳艳的人哦!!!加油，看好你。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690157482,"group_id":"7228105463013837864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"立志只看完结！！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Ut0qBn9kJ9JwTjgvFkac8n9L5Zqgm+4LokmPwl/xGN","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/60fe14d6c4e44763949d7d113e40be8b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794730&x-signature=GJrycpxAh%2B%2BXNvnEaPPHzpTWtUI%3D","user_id":"2172281159163518","user_name":"江里鹅(●'◡'●)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2172281159163518","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7228105463013837864","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+基建+无cp+轻松+爽文+搞笑】
林歆一“失足”成千古恨。
爬山中的林歆，在空中劈叉出一个一字马后，轰隆一声掉下去。
林歆：“究竟是哪个混蛋在石头上倒油，我做鬼也不会放过他！”
可惜还没做成鬼，就到了另一个世界，还是人，就是多了一点不一样的功能。
面前出现了一个“城市建设系统”的面板，是否确认此处为根据地？
林歆：“莫非是这个系统倒的油！？”
系统：“.”
“是否确认此处放置粮食店？”
“是否确认此处放置医药馆？”
建设路上，
穿书舔狗真千金，过来吧你，是建设不香，还是美食打动不了你？
白莲锦鲤妹纸，这么喜欢“养鱼”，过来吧你，姐姐的池塘需要你！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o30c0447371c0dd2c62acae5b6713b1d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"今时何夕","author_id":"","book_id":"7228105463013837864","book_name":"基建狂魔：要让异界民富国强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7228105535928435232","read_count":"261","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"428588"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"207","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,无CP,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8691ea358963adce7ff0400bf681a661~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435903&x-signature=3CMVGOxtgPt%2F9gKkdDP7rBStB%2BE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"94207503982","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.320511e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154503D3B008851D564FB391B0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_
